systems.system_notes: Cephalomedullary hip fracture nail platform using integrated interlocking screw technology for proximal femur fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official Smith+Nephew materials describe dedicated INTERTAN instrumentation and integrated screw workflow.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the antegrade intertrochanteric nail used for proximal femur fracture fixation.
Official materials describe the integrated lag screw as part of the compression construct.
Official materials describe the interlocking compression screw that maintains active compression and resists the Z-effect.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public INTERTAN materials describe the implant construct clearly but do not expose a compact public code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure or IFU pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
